arts.sum: Bayern Munich host Inter Milan in a heavyweight Champions League quarter-final tie this evening. The German giants meet the Italian champions at the Allianz Arena, in a rematch of the 2010 final. Bayern breezed past Bayer Leverkusen to reach this stage, while Inter ousted Feyenoord in the previous round to reach the last eight.
